playbook.intent: Across the active book of clients, run a structured quarterly business review that surfaces churn risk, upsell, and reference opportunities. Outputs: per-account next-quarter plan, three upsell targets, two reference asks, one graceful offboard.
playbook.scope: Across the active book of clients, run a structured quarterly business review that surfaces churn risk, upsell, and reference opportunities. Outputs: per-account next-quarter plan, three upsell targets, two reference asks, one graceful offboard.

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Score Account Health
stage.intent: Quantify churn risk across the active book.

tasks.task: Pull engagement, payment, and feedback signals per account
Score every account on the 5-criteria health rubric

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every active account has a current health score.

stage.name: Prep QBR Decks

tasks.task: For every active account, build the QBR deck from the template
Pre-fill metrics, wins, risks, and proposed next-quarter plan
Tee up upsell or graceful-offboard for red/yellow accounts

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every active account has a tailored deck ready for delivery.

stage.name: Run QBRs
stage.intent: Deliver the reviews and collect signal.

tasks.task: Schedule and run a 60-min QBR per account
Capture: renewal posture, expansion appetite, reference willingness
Note any churn intent or red flag as it surfaces

stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥80% of active accounts have been seen this quarter.

stage.name: Upsell, Reference, Offboard

tasks.task: Send 3 upsell proposals to qualified expansion accounts
Run 1 graceful offboard for an account that should not renew

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least 5 of these 6 actions are out the door.

stage.name: Quarterly Plan
stage.intent: Convert QBR outputs into next-quarter delivery.

tasks.task: Refresh the per-account plan for the new quarter
Rebalance delivery capacity around expansion vs churn-defense
Log learnings about which signals predicted renewal vs churn

stage.decision-gate: Required output: written next-quarter plan per active account.
